description: Overloop.ai is an AI outbound prospecting platform with 450M+ contacts and AI-written, personalized email and LinkedIn campaigns.
overview: Overloop.ai automates outbound lead generation and outreach with AI, running hyper-personalized email and LinkedIn campaigns on a database of more than 450 million verified contacts.
what_is: Overloop AI is an outbound prospecting platform that helps teams grow faster with AI-powered, hyper-personalized email and LinkedIn campaigns. It draws on more than 450 million verified contacts and writes personalized emails in your tone instead of relying on templates.

Campaigns can be set up in minutes, and Overloop integrates with CRMs like HubSpot and Pipedrive plus tools like Slack and Zapier, supporting email connections, enrichment, and tracking. It focuses on outbound prospecting and multichannel engagement rather than inbound lead management or complex CRM workflows.
